ClientSideComponent.Name: KIHub Hero
ClientSideComponent.ComponentManifest: {"id":"c6c6d8d0-7e2e-4b3a-b5d1-9c0f8b7a1234","alias":"KIHubHeroWebPart","componentType":"WebPart","version":"1.0.0","manifestVersion":2,"supportedHosts":["SharePointWebPart"],"supportsThemeVariants":true,"preconfiguredEntries":[{"groupId":"cf066440-0614-43d6-98ae-0b31cf14c7c3","group":{"default":"Other"},"title":{"default":"KIHub Hero"},"description":{"default":"A custom animated hero banner for the Knowledge & Innovation Hub."},"officeFabricIconFontName":"Page","properties":{"title":"Knowledge & Innovation Hub","rotatingWords":"Learn|Build|Automate|Explore|Improve","subtitle":"Your central place for AI, automation, reporting, and digital tools across THC.","button1Text":"Explore Tools","button1Link":"https://txhistory.sharepoint.com/sites/THCKnowledgeInnovation/SitePages/Home.aspx","button2Text":"Open Copilot","button2Link":"https://m365.cloud.microsoft/chat","button3Text":"Sign Up for Training","button3Link":"https://txhistory.sharepoint.com/sites/THCKnowledgeInnovation/SitePages/TrainingHub.aspx","button4Text":"Get Support","button4Link":"mailto:AIadmin@thc.texas.gov","showButtons":true}}],"loaderConfig":{"internalModuleBaseUrls":["HTTPS://SPCLIENTSIDEASSETLIBRARY/"],"entryModuleId":"ki-hub-hero-web-part","scriptResources":{"ki-hub-hero-web-part":{"type":"path","path":"ki-hub-hero-web-part_3322211342ff74aa9061.js"},"@microsoft/sp-core-library":{"type":"component","id":"7263c7d0-1d6a-45ec-8d85-d4d1d234171b","version":"1.22.2"},"@microsoft/sp-webpart-base":{"type":"component","id":"974a7777-0990-4136-8fa6-95d80114c2e0","version":"1.22.2"}}}}
